schedule_name: PERKESO Act 4 First Phase Contribution Table including LINDUNG 24 JAM

decimal_policy.calculation_storage: Store all wages and contributions as integer sen.
decimal_policy.input_precision: Accept a maximum of 2 decimal places. Reject values with more than 2 decimals.
decimal_policy.lookup_policy: Do not round wages to whole ringgit, nearest RM10, nearest RM100, or any bracket midpoint.
decimal_policy.display_policy: Display MYR values with exactly 2 decimal places.
decimal_policy.floating_point_policy: Do not use binary floating-point for payroll money.
